title: GitHub Actions budget exhausted + GH_PAT recovery
desc: Two common silent CI failures: (1) budget exhausted runs fail under 10s, (2) GH_PAT missing causes sync 403. Both look like normal failures in run list.
steps: SYMPTOM: runs fail in under 15s. Check gh run view --log-failed for billing or 403 clues.
BUDGET FIX: edit Actions row at github.com/settings/billing/budgets and raise limit. CDP read: wkappbot a11y read with eval-js document.body.innerText on billing tab.
GH_PAT MISSING: sync push logs blank GH_PAT then fatal 403. Check: gh secret list --repo kiexpert/WKAppBot
PAT FIX: gh secret set GH_PAT --repo kiexpert/WKAppBot --body TOKEN where TOKEN comes from gh auth token
RERUN: gh run rerun RUNID. Check result with gh run list.
author: claude
